title: ADR-004: Frontend hosting on Render (drop Vercel) - owner decision
objective: Formalize owner decision to serve the Next.js frontend from Render instead of Vercel: verify Render Next.js support and PR preview environments from official docs, document trade-offs, update ADR-001/002/003 cross-references and render.yaml accordingly
business_reason: Owner prefers one deployment platform; removes B-003
inputs: docs/research/render-nextjs-previews-2026-07-16.md (orchestrator-captured official Render docs: Next.js web service, preview environments Pro-gated, blueprint autoDeployTrigger values incl. quoted "off")
project-control/reports/M0-T006-G3-verification.md (amendment map for ADR-001/002/003; R1 residuals: ADR-001 line ~36 service-role wording -> Render only; quote autoDeployTrigger "off")
docs/adr/ADR-001-cloud-architecture.md and existing ADR-002/003 if present
docs/HUMAN_ACTIONS_REQUIRED.md section 3 (B-003 Vercel on hold pending this ADR)
outputs: docs/adr/ADR-004-frontend-hosting-render.md (decision, trade-off table incl. preview-strategy options and costs, consequences, rollback path)
Amendments to docs/adr/ADR-001-cloud-architecture.md (+ ADR-002/003 where the amendment map requires)
render.yaml (additive Next.js web service, autoDeployTrigger "off" quoted, production Actions-gated per M0-T006 model)

acceptance_scenarios.expected: decision matches the owner directive (Render hosts Next.js; Vercel dropped); every factual claim about Render cites the captured research file or an official URL; preview strategy explicitly decided with cost basis (preview environments are Pro-gated; service previews and no-previews evaluated)
new web service is ADDITIVE (API service untouched); autoDeployTrigger value "off" is YAML-quoted; blueprint parses as valid YAML; staging/production split preserved per M0-T006 model
ADR-001/002/003 amended per the M0-T006 G3 amendment map incl. R1 residual (service-role wording -> Render only); no dangling references to Vercel remain in ADRs, runbook, or root README
frontend deploys gated identically to backend (Actions-gated, no auto-deploy in production); no contradiction with docs/DEPLOYMENT_AND_ROLLBACK.md; rollback path for frontend documented
ADR-004 explicitly supersedes the Vercel plan so B-003 can close; PRD deviations (PRD names Vercel) acknowledged in the ADR as an approved architectural deviation with rationale

risks: PRD explicitly names Vercel; ADR must record this as a deliberate owner-approved deviation, not silently diverge
Preview environments are Pro-plan-gated on Render: choosing them has a real billing implication that needs owner visibility before purchase (no purchase in this task)
render.yaml edits must not break the accepted API service definition
